Acceptance Criteria: AC_01 — Upload valid video + Save Draft
Test Title: Upload valid MP4/MOV → Save as DRAFT
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่" option visible
Test Data:
[TBD] MP4 or MOV file: ≤5 GB, >1 min, 16:9 ratio
Required metadata values [TBD]
Test Steps:
1. Select "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่"
2. Attach and upload valid MP4 or MOV file
3. Wait for file validation and upload progress to finish
4. Fill all required metadata: Title, Learning Goal, Sub Learning Goal (1 Primary / up to 3 Secondary / 2 Mentioned), Level, Thumbnail
5. Click "บันทึกร่าง"
Expected Result:
1. File passes Type / Size / Ratio validation checks
2. Upload completes successfully
3. System saves media with status = DRAFT
4. Confirmation message displayed to Creator
5. Media appears in My Media Dashboard with DRAFT status

Acceptance Criteria: AC_02 — Upload → Transcoding success → Submit → Consent → PENDING_APPROVE
Services Impacted:
Media Service
Video Transcoding Service
Community Approval Service
Test Title: Upload valid MP4/MOV → Transcoding completes → Submit for Approval → PENDING_APPROVE
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่" option visible
Test Data:
[TBD] Same valid MP4/MOV file
Full metadata values [TBD]
Test Steps:
1. Select "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่" and upload valid file
2. Wait until Transcoding completion notification appears
3. Fill all required metadata fields completely
4. Confirm "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ" button is now enabled
5. Click "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ"
6. Accept Consent page appears — click Accept / Agree
7. Observe status update
Expected Result:
1. Transcoding completion notification shown after upload
2. "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ" is enabled when all metadata complete
3. Accept Consent page appears before submission proceeds
4. Automatic Checklist validation passes
5. Media status = PENDING_APPROVE
6. Media visible in Community Review queue

Acceptance Criteria: EC_07 — Partial metadata → Submit disabled, Draft enabled
Test Title: Partial metadata → "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ" disabled, "บันทึกร่าง" enabled
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. Valid video file uploaded and ready
Test Data:
[TBD] Valid video file
Metadata with ≥1 required field intentionally left empty [TBD]
Test Steps:
1. Upload valid video file, wait for success
2. Fill some but not all required metadata — leave at least one required field empty
3. Observe state of "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ" button
4. Click "บันทึกร่าง"
Expected Result:
1. "ส่งเพื่อขออนุมัติ" button is disabled (not clickable)
2. "บันทึกร่าง" button remains enabled and clickable
3. Clicking "บันทึกร่าง" successfully saves media as DRAFT without requiring complete metadata

Acceptance Criteria: AC_04 / EC_01 — File > 5 GB → Error before upload
Test Title: Upload video file >5 GB → Error message, upload never starts
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่" selected
Test Steps:
1. Attach a video file larger than 5 GB
2. Attempt to start upload
Expected Result:
1. System validates file size before upload begins
2. Error message: "ไฟล์มีขนาดเกินที่กำหนด กรุณาเลือกไฟล์ขนาดไม่เกิน 5 GB"
3. Upload does not start — no upload progress shown

Acceptance Criteria: AC_05 / EC_02 — Unsupported file type → Error
Test Title: Upload unsupported video format (.avi / .mkv) → Error message, upload never starts
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มวิดีโอใหม่" selected
Test Steps:
1. Attach a video file with unsupported format (.avi or .mkv)
2. Attempt to start upload
Expected Result:
1. System validates file type before upload begins
2. Error message: "ประเภทไฟล์นี้ไม่รองรับ กรุณาอัปโหลด MP4 / MOV เท่านั้น"
3. Upload does not start

Acceptance Criteria: EC_03 — Transcoding fails ≤3 times → Silent Auto Retry
Test Title: Transcoding fails ≤3 times → Auto Retry with no notification to Creator
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. Valid video uploaded successfully
3. Dev has enabled Transcoding failure simulation toggle for this session (≤3 failures)
Test Steps:
1. Upload valid video file
2. Observe system behavior as Transcoding fails on 1st attempt (and up to 3rd)
3. Monitor the UI for any notification, alert, or interruption shown to Creator
Expected Result:
1. System performs Auto Retry automatically after each failure
2. No alert, toast, or notification shown to Creator during retry attempts
3. Creator UI remains on the creation page without interruption
4. After successful retry, Transcoding completion notification appears normally

Acceptance Criteria: AC_06 / EC_04 — Transcoding fails >3 times → Notification + Retry button
Test Title: Transcoding fails >3 times → Error notification + Retry button displayed
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. Valid video uploaded successfully
3. Dev has enabled Transcoding failure simulation toggle for this session (>3 consecutive failures)
Test Steps:
1. Upload valid video file
2. Observe as Transcoding fails and all 3 Auto Retry attempts are exhausted
3. Observe system notification after 3rd failure
Expected Result:
1. After 3rd Auto Retry fails, notification: "ไม่สามารถอัปโหลดได้ กรุณาลองใหม่อีกครั้ง"
2. Retry button appears and is clickable
3. No further automatic retry occurs beyond 3 attempts

Acceptance Criteria: AC_03 (Draft path) — YouTube valid URL + own channel → Save Draft
Test Title: Valid YouTube URL (Creator owns channel) + full metadata → Save as DRAFT
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มลิงก์ YouTube/embed" selected
Test Data:
[TBD] Valid YouTube URL where logged-in Creator is channel owner
Full metadata values [TBD]
Test Steps:
1. Select "เพิ่มลิงก์ YouTube/embed"
2. Enter valid YouTube URL from Creator's own channel
3. Wait for URL validation result
4. Fill all required metadata fields
5. Click "บันทึกร่าง"
Expected Result:
1. URL validation passes — success notification shown
2. No file upload required
3. Media saved as DRAFT
4. DRAFT media appears in My Media Dashboard

Services Impacted:

Precondition:

Test Data:
[TBD] Same valid YouTube URL (own channel)
Full metadata values [TBD]
Test Steps:

Acceptance Criteria: AC_07 / EC_05 — Invalid YouTube URL → Error
Test Title: Invalid YouTube URL format → Error message
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มลิงก์ YouTube/embed" selected
Test Data: [TBD] URL with invalid format (e.g., non-YouTube domain or malformed YouTube link)
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid YouTube URL
2. Trigger URL validation (submit field or unfocus)
Expected Result:
1. System validates the URL
2. Error message: "URL ไม่ถูกต้อง กรุณาตรวจสอบลิงก์ YouTube อีกครั้ง"
3. Embed rejected — Creator cannot proceed with this URL

Acceptance Criteria: AC_07 / EC_06 — YouTube URL not owned by Creator → Rejected
Test Title: YouTube URL from another creator's channel → Embed rejected + notification
Precondition:
1. On media creation page
2. "เพิ่มลิงก์ YouTube/embed" selected
Test Data: [TBD] Valid YouTube URL format but belongs to a channel NOT owned by the logged-in Creator
Test Steps:
1. Enter a valid-format YouTube URL from a channel not owned by this Creator
2. Trigger ownership validation
Expected Result:
1. System rejects the embed
2. Notification displayed indicating Creator does not own this channel
3. Creator cannot proceed with submission using this URL
